creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Slight potential for confusion with 535.98 still shown for the meta port that installs nvidia-drm-510-kmod 535.104.05. 

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/nvidia-drm-kmod/>

I'm inclined to treat this as negligible – I do understand why it's not strictly necessary to bump the meta port. 

NVIDIA aside, meta port <https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-kmod/> uses a date-oriented versioning scheme.
